faq.title: FAQ & Security
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the platform
faq.mottoSub: The VYRO team works 24/7 to guarantee the best experience
faq.supportAvailable: Our support team is available 24/7 to answer any question.
faq.disclaimer: The information provided in this FAQ is for informational purposes. VYRO GPU reserves the right to modify parameters and policies with notice to users.

items.a: VYRO GPU is an innovative cloud computing platform that allows users to activate powerful GPU processing units to generate internal Dollars through distributed computing power. Each active GPU contributes to the network and generates rewards proportional to its TFLOPS power.

It's simple: you purchase and activate a GPU from our catalog, the system registers it in your dashboard, and from that moment it starts producing Dollars automatically. Production is calculated based on the GPU's TFLOPS and is updated in real time in the Live Production Bar.

TFLOPS (Tera Floating-point Operations Per Second) is the unit of measurement of a GPU's computing power. The more TFLOPS a GPU has, the greater its processing capacity and therefore its Dollar production. Our GPUs range from 4 TFLOPS (X-120) to 6300 TFLOPS (IX-9900 Ultimate).

items.q: What are the Ultimate Edition GPUs?
items.a: Ultimate Editions are premium versions of our most powerful GPUs, with 50% increased power and exclusive design. They are identified by the "ULTIMATE" suffix in the name and offer the maximum productive capacity of the platform.

VYRO Vault™ is our offline cold storage system where we keep 98% of user assets. Private keys are maintained in biometric-access vaults, distributed across 3 continents to ensure maximum security and redundancy.

Neural Shield™ is our AI-based protection system that monitors all transactions in real time. It uses advanced pattern recognition to detect anomalies and automatically blocks suspicious operations before they are executed, protecting your account from fraud and unauthorized access.

Quantum Lock™ is our military-grade encryption system that uses AES-256 combined with elliptic curves to protect all sensitive data. Encryption keys are rotated every 24 hours and the system uses zero-knowledge proof for authentication, ensuring your credentials are never exposed.

Trust Score™ is a reputation score from 0 to 100 assigned to your account based on your activity, transaction history and platform behavior. A high score unlocks higher withdrawal limits, exclusive bonuses and support priority.

Secure Recovery™ allows you to recover access to your account through a 12-word seed phrase generated at registration. Optionally, you can activate Social Recovery, which allows trusted contacts to approve restoring your account. All recoveries include a 48-hour time-lock for maximum security.

We support multiple authentication methods: 2FA via app (Google Authenticator, Authy), SMS OTP, biometric authentication (fingerprint, Face ID), and hardware keys (YubiKey). We recommend activating at least two methods for maximum security.

Earnings are calculated by multiplying your GPU's TFLOPS by a base production coefficient ($0.05 per TFLOPS per minute). The system updates the calculation every second and you can view production in real time in the Live Production Bar in the "My Devices" section.

Earnings depend on the power of your GPUs. Here are some examples:
• X-120 (4 TF): ~$12.32/week
• G-700 (68 TF): ~$209.94/week
• X-7900 (900 TF): ~$3,703/week
• IX-9900 Ultimate (6300 TF): ~$31,000/week
Dollar production is credited automatically every second and visible instantly in your balance. Generated Dollars are immediately available for new activations, transfers or conversions.

items.q: Can I have multiple active GPUs?
items.a: Absolutely! You can activate as many GPUs as you want. Total production will be the sum of the power of all your active GPUs. The more GPUs you own, the greater your productive capacity and earnings.
Each user has a unique invite code and a shareable QR link. When someone registers through your link, they join your team as a Level 1 member. Members they invite become your Level 2.

Commissions are divided into:
• Level 1 (direct invites): 3% on production + 5% activation bonus
• Level 2 (invites of your invites): 2% on production + 3% activation bonus
Commissions are calculated in real time and credited automatically.

Yes! The team system includes progressive bonuses:
• 3 active members: +10% on all commissions
• 10 active members: +25% + "Team Builder" badge
• 50 active members: +50% + "Network Leader" badge
• 100+ members: Exclusive access to Collector Edition GPUs

items.q: How do I monitor my team?
items.a: In the Team section you can see all Level 1 and 2 members, their status (active/inactive), whether they have active GPUs, their total production, and the earnings they generate for you. The dashboard updates in real time.

Every day you can claim $2.5 for free by visiting the Benefits section. This bonus is designed to reward the consistency of active users. If you maintain a streak of 7 consecutive days, you unlock an extra bonus of $10.

Daily missions include:
• Daily login: +$1
• Daily claim: +$2.5
• Check devices: +$0.5
• Invite a friend: +$5
Completing all missions guarantees additional bonuses.

Badges are achievements you earn by reaching specific objectives:
• "First Login" - Platform access
• "First GPU" - First device activation
• "Team Builder" - Invite 3 members
• "Streak 7" - 7 consecutive claims
• "Power User" - Reach 100 TFLOPS
• "Top Earner" - Generate $10,000 total

The leaderboard shows the top performers on the platform based on total Dollars and TFLOPS power. Being in the top 3 guarantees special visibility, weekly bonuses, and the coveted "Crown" badge that appears on your profile.

VYRO GPU is certified:
• SOC 2 Type II Compliant - Security & Availability
• ISO 27001 Certified - Information Security
• GDPR Compliant - Data Protection
• PCI DSS Level 1 - Payment Security
These certifications are renewed annually with external audits.

items.q: Do you have a Bug Bounty Program?
items.a: Yes! Our Bug Bounty Program rewards security researchers who find vulnerabilities in our system. Prizes range from $100 to $50,000 depending on severity. All details are available at security.vyrogpu.com

We collaborate with industry leaders to ensure the highest quality:
• NVIDIA - GPU hardware partnership
• AWS - Cloud infrastructure
• Cloudflare - DDoS protection
• Ledger - Cold storage solutions
• Chainalysis - Compliance & Monitoring

Our infrastructure is designed for 99.97% guaranteed uptime. We use:
• Datacenters distributed across 3 continents
• Automatic load balancing
• Real-time failover
• Incremental backups every hour
System status is always visible in the dashboard.
